reviews.review_description: I absolutely recommend this app as I have done it straight for 50 days so far and I dont want to quit my streak!  I love the instructors and they really motivate me to do my best.  I have noticed that my arms are a lot stronger and more defined and I have lost a few pounds.  Dont hesitate to try it and for me, it is worth the money.  I can work out in my home, when I want to and I really enjoy the exercises as they feel like fun, motivational games.  How cool is that!

developer_response.body: The arms, the pounds, the 50-day streak. You're out here thriving and we love to see it 💙

reviews.review_title: Cheaper than a Gym and Way more Fun
reviews.review_description:
A personal trainer at my gym costs $90/session and the monthly fee for the gym equipment, without access to a trainer, is $99/m. 
I'll take a FUN $13/m game over that ANY time. It's time for me to get in shape and this is how I plan on doing it!!
The classes are fun. The coaches are inspiring. I definitely shed a couple tears when I first started just bc I felt welcomed and encouraged.

I only have ONE qualm. There should be legitimate programs that are designed for each person's goals. That was something that the initial questions for set-up led me to believe I would have access to. Instead of a set path, I'm just choosing which classes to take. And I don't know if I'm ready for them when I start them. (Side note here, there was no training for the down punches and I found that interesting, it threw me off the first time I saw them) The programs should increase and decrease in difficulty, with IRL check ins, and ALSO there should be mandatory stretching and cool downs per session. Let's encourage healthier workouts!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful review and for sharing your experience with FitXR.
We're delighted to hear that you've found an enjoyable and motivating way to support your fitness goals, and that our coaches have helped create a positive and encouraging environment.
We also appreciate your feedback regarding structured training plans, progression, movement tutorials, and recovery-focused content. These are valuable suggestions, and we've shared them with the team as we continue working to improve the experience for members of all fitness levels.
Thank you for being part of the FitXR community, and we wish you every success on your fitness journey! 💪

reviews.review_description: I've tried other fitness apps on my Meta quest VR but I kept coming back to FitXR. I cancelled all the other free trial subscriptions and joined FitXR. I've been doing this for 23 days straight now and it's such a game changer. I tell everyone about it. Everything about FitXR is great. The different workouts, the coaches pushing you on and actually training you correctly and the daily challenges get me going. The community I've become a part of is wonderful. Working out with people from around the world and making friends. Thank you so much FitXR.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that FitXR has become such an important part of your fitness journey. It's wonderful to know you're enjoying the workouts, coaches, daily challenges, and community. Congratulations on 23 days straight, that's an incredible achievement! Thank you for being part of FitXR and for sharing it with others.

reviews.review_description: This workout program is AMAZING.  There are so many workouts to choose from, the music is catchy, and the challenges and rewards really keep you coming back every day! On top of that, the customer support is unmatched.  The developers also really listen to their users and very often implement user requests and suggestions.  Working out has never been this fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review! 💙 It means a lot to hear your kind words about our support team too. Thanks for being part of the FitXR community, and we'll keep working hard to make every workout even better! 💪

reviews.review_title: New to the VR fitness experience
reviews.review_description:
I’ve always been “gym challenged”…having time to go, gym hours, crowds, etc. in my almost 56 years on earth I can have a ready excuse.  with the little space in any room I choose and I now don’t have an excuse. No problem so far!  I’ve even boxed in the laundry room 🙂

I have always liked boxing for fitness. After being sedentary after medical recovery, this has been very easy for me. Some people don’t like the coaching (that can be turned off) I find it encouraging.  I’ve closed my fitness rings everytime I work out!  Very good for a solid cardio work out, I think good for beginners or if you’re getting back on the fitness saddle. 

Note:  I haven’t tried the other programs, but as I build my routine, it’s going down 💪🏾

developer_response.body: Welcome to the crew! Boxing in the laundry room is honestly peak VR fitness and we are here for it. Really glad FitXR is helping you get back into a routine after your recovery💙

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been using FitXR for my workouts, and it’s been one of the most enjoyable ways I’ve found to stay active. The variety of classes keeps things interesting, whether it’s boxing, dance, HIIT, or strength training. The instructors are motivating, the workouts are challenging, and the immersive VR experience makes exercise feel more like fun than a chore.

What I appreciate most is how easy it is to fit a workout into a busy day. Even a quick 15-20 minute session leaves me feeling energized and accomplished. The app has helped me stay consistent with my fitness goals because I actually look forward to using it.

If you’re looking for a workout program that keeps you engaged and moving, FitXR is definitely worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a thoughtful review! We're delighted to hear FitXR has become an enjoyable part of your routine and helps you stay consistent with your goals. It's great that the variety of classes and immersive experience keep you coming back for more. Thanks for being part of our community, and here's to many more energizing workouts ahead! 💪

reviews.review_description:
A beautiful app! I really hope that someday I can lose weight and tone up my body.
I would also be really thankful if you could add some extra features. For example, a “Today’s Progress” section. I know there is a mobile app, but it mostly shows graphics and not actual numbers. I’d love to see how much time I spent working out today, as well as the total calories burned for the day.
It would also be perfect if you could add some workout programs with weights. That would be amazing!
Thank you for the app!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! You can check the calories burned for each individual workout in the companion app, but we don't have a daily total across all sessions. We really appreciate you sharing what would help, and we'll make sure this gets to the team for consideration as we work on future updates 💪

reviews.review_description:
I came to FitXR after being a Supernatural user for years, though I will be honest in recent months I have fallen off pretty hard with the removal of coaches and lack of new updates.  I got an ad for FitXR one day and gave it a shot.  I was extremely surprised with how much I enjoyed it!  There are some downsides (compared to Supernatural) but the things it does right it does RIGHT.

PROS:
-Great feedback loop with seasons and different daily challenges which pushes me out of my comfort zone.
-Extremely easy to do your class "community style" to challenge yourself a little more.
-Great amount of tracking for those keeping an eye on exercise and activity levels.
-Very nice and supportive coaches (though none will ever replace Coach Ranier in my heart).
-Many different exercise types to really mix up what you are doing for your routines.

Cons: 
-Music selection isn't as good as Supernatural (though I feel that was one of SN's downfalls with the licensing).
-Flow is quite good in FitXR but not quite as snappy as SN yet but I feel like it is getting better by the day.
-The environments are very cool but sometimes I do miss the panoramas that were in SN.

TLDR:  there are so many things that FitXR does right and if you are looking for something to fill the void left by supernatural I would 100% give it a try!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for giving FitXR a try and for sharing such a thoughtful review!
We really appreciate your honest feedback, it's great to hear what you’re enjoying, especially the challenges, variety, and community features. And we hear you on the music, flow, and environments too, those are all areas we’re continuously working to improve.
We’re so glad to have you with us, and hope we can keep surprising you in the best ways 💪

reviews.review_description: Love FitXR. Feel so much better since started and there are always new additions and motivations so never gets boring. Have generally resisted subscriptions but FitXR lives up to promises, worth every penny. Thank you all 🤗

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! 🤗 We're so happy to hear you're enjoying the variety, motivation, and new content. Thanks for being part of the FitXR community! 💪

reviews.review_description: Started with FitXR when it was not a subscription (2020ish).  There are lots of different ways to move; Box, Combat, HIIT, Zumba, Sculpt, Flow and Dance.  There is something for everyone.  The virtual targets help keep you honest and the scoring lets you know how to improve.  It keeps track of your progress and gives you goals to achieve.  for the last 5 years I progressed from beginner classes up to master series and I only do 40 mins 3 days a week.  Even when I feel low on energy I can still get motivated to move with this.  Highly recommended.

developer_response.body:
Wow 💜losing 100 lbs is an incredible achievement! Thank you so much for sharing your journey with us. We’re truly inspired to hear how FitXR has supported you over the last 5 years. It’s amazing that you’ve built such consistency and motivation. Stories like yours are exactly why we do what we do.
Thank you for being part of the FitXR community and for recommending us to others

reviews.review_description: I love that it's fun with new workouts, and pushes you to wanna do better and get those badges. End up doing an 8 minute 5 minute and a 6 minute and i'm soaking with sweat and the best part is that i am having fun.  I love the challenge in trying to beat myself and beat others. highly recommend if you wanna have a good time and get an exercise in at the same time.

developer_response.body: Really great to hear this! Love that it’s become something you look forward to and that you’re enjoying the challenge while staying active. Appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

reviews.review_description: I started this app yesterday and I honestly didn’t want to put it down the workouts are so fun you don’t even notice you’re working out! I do every move to my full potential just to dodge and attack the obstacles/targets! This is a 10/10 in my book! New music is the only thing that would make this better!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We're so happy to hear you're already having such a great time with FitXR.
Music is a big part of the experience for us too, so we appreciate the feedback!
Welcome to FitXR, and we hope you continue enjoying every session 💜

reviews.review_title: The best fitness app by far
reviews.review_description: Highly underrated, this fitness app has it all and the content feels premium compared to others. I brought the yearly subscription after my first use. Day 1 I sweated like a pig lol and used muscles I’ve forgotten about in years. Can’t wait to use it again

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this incredible review 💙
We’re so happy to hear you had such a strong first experience. It means a lot to hear you’re enjoying the variety and quality of the workouts. We can’t wait to keep sweating with you on your fitness journey!

reviews.review_description:
This app has genuinely changed my life. I’m down 14 pounds since starting 3 months ago with funfitland and just gave this a try and I love it!! more importantly, it changed my entire lifestyle

I spent years trying every diet, every quick fix, and every workout plan out there. Nothing ever stuck because exercise always felt like punishment. FitXR made it FUN.

I came for boxing and thought that would be enough, but I ended up loving everything, dance, HIIT, combat, flow, all of it. I worked out for over an hour and didn’t even realize it because I was having so much fun.

For the first time in my life, I actually look forward to working out. I have more energy, I feel stronger, healthier, happier, and I’ve completely changed the way I view fitness.

Whoever created this, thank you!!! You didn’t just create an app, you created something that can truly change people’s lives.

developer_response.body:
Wow ❤️ this is amazing to read . Thank you so much for sharing your journey with us. Turning fitness from something that felt like a chore into something you genuinely enjoy. That’s exactly what we hope to create.
Stories like yours truly mean the world to us. We’re so happy to be part of your journey, and we’re cheering you on every step of the way 💪✨

reviews.review_description: I love it! At first I thought I would never figure it out and got frustrated. Now, several weeks later, I’m using it everyday and have used several of the modes. I do still get frustrated, but it’s because I miss a target, not because I can’t figure out the program

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this! We’re really glad to hear you stuck with it and are now using FitXR every day across different modes. It’s totally normal to have those frustrating moments, but it’s great to hear it’s all part of the challenge now. Keep it up 💪

reviews.review_description: I have been doing this for a year and a half , first exercise program that I have kept going with .  Gets you moving in the mornings and weakens you up .  Is good for the mind and body .

developer_response.body: A year and a half and still going strong, that's fantastic to hear! We're glad FitXR has become part of your mornings. Here's to many more sessions 💙

reviews.review_description: I'm currently trying out the free trial and so far I really enjoy this workout app, I have been returning daily trying different things, I think what I like most is the Boxing. Would definitely recommend this app to anyone looking for fun challenging workouts that make you sweat!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for giving FitXR a try! We’re thrilled to hear you’ve been enjoying the workouts and coming back daily. Boxing is definitely a community favorite 🔥
We really appreciate the recommendation and hope you continue having fun while breaking a sweat with us.

reviews.review_description: This app is a game changer! I have so much energy from moving my body in this app and i've noticed that i've started sleeping better at night as well! if you haven't tried this app out you won't regret it when you do!

developer_response.body: That's what it's all about. Thank you so much for sharing this, we're stoked to hear you're feeling the energy boost and sleeping better. Keep crushing it 💙

reviews.review_title: I love it, but I miss the environments
reviews.review_description:
I love this game a lot and play it every day, always trying to do my best. Flow is super fun. Coach Karma is my favorite in the dance section, but what I really miss is the environments.
I even bought a one-year subscription because you advertised 18 new environments, but I didn’t get them. I contacted support, and they told me that they hadn’t promised I would receive them immediately:
“The 18 new environments are delivered as part of our Seasons and appear in the app as the Seasons roll out, rather than being unlocked all at once.”
So buying the full year didn’t really give me anything new in that offer. In any case, I would really like to have the option to buy old environments.
Thanks.

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying the app and thank you for the support 🙏 A new environment is introduced every month as part of our Challenge-Reward system, so you have until the end of each month to complete the required challenges and unlock it as one of the rewards. We hear you on making older environments available, though. That's something the team is aware of as we continue to develop the app. Thanks for sticking with us!

reviews.review_description: I have been using Supernatural and Funfitland for a couple of years. With the Meta scare over Supernatural I tried Fitxr. Should have tried it sooner. Choice of workout type. Boxing, combat,dancing ,Hiit,Zumba and now flow. Even has multiplayer so I can workout with family.  Just try it. If your serious about working out, you will not regret it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for sharing this, what an awesome review!
We’re really glad you gave FitXR a try and that you’re enjoying the variety of workouts and multiplayer features. It’s great to hear it’s become part of your routine, especially coming from other fitness apps.
Appreciate the recommendation, and we’ll keep working hard to bring you even more ways to move and have fun! 💪

reviews.review_description:
This app has improved infinitely since it's inception.
It has everything I could want in a fitness app, from intense cardio to cool downs. Recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing feedback 💙
It means a lot to hear how much you’ve enjoyed the progress of the app over time. We’re really happy the variety of workouts is helping you stay active and motivated. Thanks for recommending FitXR!

reviews.review_title: Awesome!! Is all I have to say
reviews.review_description: I’m loving this fitness app and I’ve tried a few including one that’s going away. I see they brought over something from supernatural which is cool, but next they need to add the 360 degree workout supernatural had that u really loved to have that option. So by far this is a 100% purchase even as it is.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing feedback, it really means a lot to us! 😊
We’re thrilled to hear you’re loving FitXR. Your suggestion about adding a 360-degree workout experience is a fantastic one, we can absolutely see how that would take things to the next level. I’ll be sure to pass this along to our team for consideration.
Thanks again for your support, and we’re so happy to have you as part of the FitXR community.

reviews.review_description: I especially love the new Flow classes. They are my favorite. Would love to see a tai chi type class added.  Better hand tracking interface would be great, but I love this app and feel it is worth the price

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful review! We're so happy to hear you're enjoying Flow and that it's helping you stay motivated. A Tai Chi-inspired class is a fantastic idea, and we'll be sure to share your suggestion with the team. We also appreciate your feedback about hand tracking. Thanks for being part of the FitXR community!

reviews.review_description: so far i love this app. It has so many workouts to choose from and the music is good to. Cant wait to see progress soon!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the lovely review 💙 We’re so happy to hear you’re enjoying the variety of workouts and the music so far! Keep going, you’re just getting started, and we can’t wait for you to see your progress too.

reviews.review_description:
Okay so! I've played this for about a year now so I have a lot to say 
Things I dislike: 
- The new Flow mode is really nice and I'm glad it was introduced. However, as someone who plays Beatsaber, it's definitely not as smooth as it could be. The movement is awkward and sometimes doesn't align with the targets even if you hit it right and that's specific to just this mode, and the sound of the hits feel cheap and unsatisfying, like you're hitting a plastic bag. I'd love for the movement to be smoother, and for the hit sounds to feel powerful and have some bass in them. I'd love for it to feel like I'm playing an even better version of beatsaber. I'm super looking forward to this mode improving!
- Some coaches have very lame, generic commentary that doesn't match the vibe of the sessions at all. I love Dane and Casey and I often filter them specifically, they're very hype and fun. Don't like the guy who calls me champ every 2 mins. 

Things I love: 
Everything else! I love that it makes exercising fun, the music genres are diverse, the season changes are refreshing and bring a different vibe, all in all 8/10!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share all of this! Feedback like yours is exactly what helps us keep improving. Flow is still in its early days, and getting it to feel as responsive and satisfying as possible is very much on our radar. Hit feedback and movement precision are areas we're actively looking at. Really glad the rest of the experience is landing well, and we hope to keep seeing you in the app! 💙

reviews.review_description:
I was never so engaged with daily workouts as now with FitXR.
Recommend it greatly!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! 💪 We're thrilled to hear FitXR has helped you stay engaged with your daily workouts. Thanks for the recommendation, and keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: Great Way to a Better You
reviews.review_description: I've recently subscribed to FitXR, and it has quickly become my favorite thing to do in VR. The workouts are intense, but the guidance and motivation from the trainers are top notch!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! This is just the beginning. The more you explore, the better it gets 💪 Welcome to the community!

reviews.review_title: Paywalled product, not free at all
reviews.review_description:
I wanted to try this as it seemed like a highly rated rhythm / boxing game.

Instead of letting you jump in and actually try things, you have to spend ~10 minutes filling out an unskippable survey that asks you all sorts of information about your activity levels age sleep etc. I tried everything to skip it as I was getting bored halfway through, even restarted the app, but it just resumes where you left off.

After the survey is done you get presented with a paywall for a subscription plan. You can close the window with the X button and then you are allowed to play a very short 2 minute tutorial level - which is pretty well done by the way. After that you get presented with an account creation prompt requesting your email - at which stage I quit and uninstalled, because that would most likely lead back to the same paywall, but now with me supplying them even more data. 

Overall it's not the quality that is the issue, because what little they do show for free is decent, what's not decent is the predatory paywall, subscription model, as well as some of the questionable reviews on here that seem to be overjoyed with all of this or don't even mention it.
(The store policies should probably also be revised when it comes to listing things in the "free" category that don't even offer 1% of their content for free..)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback.
We’re glad you enjoyed the tutorial and found the experience itself to be good, even during your short trial.
The onboarding questionnaire is designed to personalize workouts based on fitness level and goals, and the subscription flow is part of the experience as listed in the Meta Store. The store clearly indicates that users can access a free 7-day trial, which requires starting a subscription, and this can be cancelled at any time within the trial period without being charged.
We’re sorry to hear you decided to uninstall, and we really appreciate you giving it a try. We’d be happy to see you back in the app again in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I really wanted FitXR to work after Supernatural was pushed into maintenance mode, but for me it just highlights what made Supernatural special in the first place. FitXR gets the job done as a workout, but the experience feels flat. The music is mostly forgettable, the coaches are trying hard but don’t have the same presence or connection, and the Odyssey environments I’ve found are honestly kind of depressing instead of energizing.
What I miss most is that Supernatural felt immersive and joyful. The movement flowed naturally with your body instead of feeling like you were just swiping targets in a game. FitXR’s Flow workouts feel much closer to Beat Saber — more competitive, more arcade-like, and focused on avatars and leaderboards rather than the feeling of moving through music and scenery. Supernatural felt like exercise disguised as an experience; FitXR feels like exercise.

I also really miss the integration with my watch. That seamless connection made Supernatural feel polished and intentional, and losing it makes the whole experience feel less complete. It’s frustrating because Supernatural proved VR fitness could motivate people to move every single day without turning it into a cartoonish metaverse competition.

developer_response.body: Really sorry it hasn't clicked for you yet, but appreciate the candid review. We have several updates in the works as we continue to grow and improve the experience, so hopefully we get to welcome you back in the future.

reviews.review_description: I have never sweat so much in my life and had fun while doing it. I'm already down 6 pounds. Get fitxr you won't regret it

developer_response.body: Down 6 pounds and having fun doing it? That's the dream right there! Welcome to the FitXR community 🤗

reviews.review_title: Just an absolute pleasure and delight.
reviews.review_description: To everyone at FitXR you are doing an amazing job. As someone who used to gym 4 days a week for 5 years, I've found this app to be solid and surely tests your fitness levels. As an avid martial artist too, I found boxing to be awesome, engaging and challenging. What a reason to buy a VR headset.

developer_response.body: “Absolute pleasure and delight” is a tough one to top 😄 Really glad it’s holding its own for someone with your training background. Sounds like that headset purchase paid off pretty quickly. See you back in there soon!

reviews.review_description: Love FitXR, motivating, always new classes, helping me with recovery whilst i cant run, as this is burning the same amount of cals. Recommend.

developer_response.body:
We’re really happy to hear FitXR has been helping you stay active and motivated during your recovery journey. It’s great to know the variety of classes is keeping things fresh and enjoyable for you. Thank you so much for sharing this!
Wishing you all the best with your recovery, and thank you for recommending FitXR.

reviews.review_description:
After using every day for a month I'm tired of the same few dialoga that i hear all the time and the very few music tracks. 
the set of moves in boxing and combat feels more like a game rather than real battle.
Also I didn't got a free months that was offered which is a bit frustrating

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your honest feedback. We’re sorry to hear the experience started feeling repetitive for you, especially with the dialogue and music variety. We’re always working on adding new content and improving the workout experience, and feedback like this really helps.
We also understand your point about Boxing and Combat feeling more game-like than realistic training, and we appreciate you sharing that perspective.
Regarding the free month you mentioned, we’re sorry for the frustration. Please feel free to reach out to [support@fitxr.com](mailto:support@fitxr.com) with more details about the offer you saw, and the team will be happy to look into it for you.
Thanks again for giving FitXR a try 💪

reviews.review_description: Such a good workout but so much fun it doesnt feel like a workout

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much 💙
That’s exactly what we love to hear, getting a great workout while having so much fun that it doesn’t even feel like exercise 😊 So glad you’re enjoying FitXR!

reviews.review_description: This is the first workout I've ever stuck with!

developer_response.body: That's what we love to hear! Welcome to the crew 💙

reviews.review_description: I love fitxr it's so fun . I love working out in my vr.  Love the music and the coaches . Hand tracking seems to have got better.  Love the different themes .

developer_response.body: VR + music + great coaches = no more excuses to skip a workout 😄 Thanks for being part of the FitXR family, this kind of feedback keeps us going. See you in the studio!

reviews.review_description: Never thought I would have so much fun working out. They're constantly updating,  the coaches are all cool and motivating and it works with you not really realizing you're working out. I love the environments and always looking forward to them updating with new ones.

developer_response.body: We love seeing this kind of energy 💙 Sounds like you’ve found your groove. Plenty more to come, so we’ll keep you on your toes.

reviews.review_description: I’m not an overly active person, but FitXR has genuinely kept me accountable. Even on days when I can’t be bothered after work, I still end up doing a session because it’s actually fun and engaging. The workouts are varied, the instructors keep the energy up and there’s a great mix of styles and time lengths, which makes it easy to fit something in around a busy schedule. It’s been a surprisingly motivating way to move more and I’m really glad I gave it a try.

developer_response.body: This is great to read. The fact it’s become something you actually want to jump into after a long day says a lot. That’s exactly the kind of rhythm that sticks, and it’s awesome to see it clicking like that for you. Keep it going 💪

reviews.review_description: good workout for ADHD

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great review!
Congratulations on your incredible progress! We're so happy to hear FitXR has been a good fit for you and your fitness journey.
 Keep up the amazing work!

reviews.review_description:
The game is really cool BUT please, make more environments often. Or maybe its time to give us a custom one... Its starting to be boring like that 😞 
And im not even talked about the music 😜

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you're enjoying the app overall. 😊 Our team is continually working hard to bring more variety and fresh experiences to FitXR, including new environments and workout content. We know how much immersive surroundings and great music add to the experience, so we'll be sure to pass your suggestions along to the team. Thanks for helping us make FitXR even better!

reviews.review_description: I recomend it, for sure

developer_response.body: We appreciate the love 💙

reviews.review_description: Only used it a couple of days so far, but i intend to keep going back in. I can see the potential in this app for fitness and body tone. Workouts are fun and the AI coaches are great too. I know i am not quite getting it right just now with my body stance and movement, but it's getting me moving. Hopefully i will get the full benefits of this exorcise app soon with practice i should fit right in

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review 💛
We’re really glad to hear you’re enjoying the workouts, that’s exactly what we love to hear! 😊
Just to clarify, our coaches are actually real professional trainers who design and lead the workouts, they’re just represented as avatars in the app.
It’s completely normal to take a little time to get used to the movements and stance, you’re already on the right track by staying consistent. With a bit of practice, everything will start to feel more natural and you’ll get even more out of your sessions.
Keep it up, you’re doing great 🙌

reviews.review_description:
The workouts and coaches are incredible. Absolutely can not get enough and look forward to my sessions. After 7 days I can already see and feel results. Sign up for the trial I ask so glad I did.

Update.
After 7 weeks I am still excited to get on fit XR everyday. I've branched out beyond the boxing and combat and sprinkle in the sculpting, the HIIT even a little bit of the dance class. As well as actually trying the community rooms to share classes with others. I never IRL would I join a fitness class it's just not my thing. However doing it from the privacy of my home with the Privacy levels I am comfortable with. This is a game changer, workouts are so much more intense which I really enjoy. Excited to see where I will be in 4 months. The two months in have been transformative. I'm stronger and have oodles of stamina.  Additionally my confidence is soaring because I'm comfortable with myself again.

developer_response.body: This is such a joy to read. Thank you for sharing your journey so openly with us. The consistency, the confidence, the momentum… that’s all you. We’re just lucky to be part of it. Keep showing up and we’ll keep bringing the heat 💙

reviews.review_description: Probably the best exercise app, and yet for an app on this platform it is still too expensive. I'm 100% positive someone with a degree in business but zero experience in VR made this decision because you would be far more profitable with the different model. I know this because frequenting VRchat and bigscreen beta I love telling people about the level of fitness I achieved with VR and wrist weights. I know that there are a tons of costs when developing content like this, and the number one response is your app is too expensive. You would be making more money with a different model. When literally everybody's feedback is "I would do that but it's too pricey"... yeah that's not a good decision. You can tell they have terrible reading comprehension and don't understand by this ignorant copy-paste response I got. They clearly have no idea how much more money they could be making.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving your thoughts, we respect your perspective. The reason the subscription model works best for us is because FitXR is built to keep evolving over time rather than being a one-off purchase. For example, we release new classes every day, continuously expanding an already extensive library of workouts. On top of that, we also introduce new environments each month, along with a steady stream of new features to keep things feeling fresh. We’ve got our brand new studio Flow coming April 1st, which is something the team has been working hard on and that the community has been asking for over time. That ongoing content and development is what the subscription supports. We know it won’t feel like the right fit for everyone, but we’re always listening to feedback and looking at how we can make the experience feel more worthwhile for as many people as possible.

reviews.review_description: May be more expensive than the other apps but is very user friendly.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the FitXR experience and finding the app user friendly.
We work hard to offer a wide variety of classes, coaches, music, and regular new content to make every workout engaging and worth coming back to. Thank you for being such a valued member of our community.

reviews.review_description: This is life changing and so helpful for keeping me active

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re really happy to hear FitXR is helping you stay active and making a difference for you.

reviews.review_title: I'm glad that I took a chance on change.
reviews.review_description: I have been faithful to Les mills for a couple of years for boxing but I was curious and decided to give the week trial a shot and I'm so glad that I did. I have enjoyed the variety offered through this app and the ability to disable certain elements in a workout is a plus. Time really does fly while using this app and I felt motivated to come back. I like the community visual with the movement points as an added motivator.  My biggest complaints are the boxing seems more aerobics based and less on the person's ability to use their body to power a punch via footwork. I don't feel like I was about to get a good of a lower body exercise unless I used sculpt. While I did enjoy the trial, not being to just buy the app with an option for purchasing additional content is a drawback, I really don't enjoy having another subscription.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for giving us a try and for sharing your thoughtful feedback!
We’re really glad you enjoyed the variety, customization options, and the motivating community features, that’s great to hear 😊
We also appreciate your comments on the boxing workouts. Your feedback around footwork and lower body engagement is very valuable, and we’ll be sure to share it with the team.
We understand that subscriptions aren’t for everyone, and we truly appreciate you sharing your perspective on that as well.
Thanks again for your support, we hope to keep you moving with us! 💪

reviews.review_description: I would be perfectly willing to purchase a good boxing/fitness app, and in fact have purchased several. As a one-time investment, it's a good buy. But a subscription? Having to pay for the same app over and over again? No thank you; there are plenty of other equally good options available that don't demand I continue paying them ad infinitum. It's a shame, too; it's a decent app and it used to have a conventional payment method and I used to use it on a different account. I would have even bought it again for this account. It's not, however, good enough to tempt me to continue paying for it indefinitely forever. I'll come back if they ever decide to let you actually purchase the app again. Until then...pass.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We understand that subscriptions aren’t for everyone. FitXR moved to a subscription model to provide regular new workouts, music, and features, but we appreciate you sharing your thoughts and will pass your feedback on to the team.

reviews.review_description: I have been regularly using and enjoying fitness apps for years on Quest.  When Meta announced they were ceasing new content for Supernatural I dropped my subscription for it and did a trial of FitXR.  I was not expecting to like FitXR near as much as SN due to its lack of well known music artists, however the larger variety of workout types and daily goals has made it my favorite Quest fitness app of all!  I am happy to now use FitXR as my every day main fitness app and plan to keep my subscription indefinitely or to least until something even better comes along!

developer_response.body: Well, that’s a review we’re framing on the wall. Glad FitXR earned a permanent spot in your workout routine. Thanks for the love 💙
No, YOU are! 😏 Thanks for the love 💙

reviews.review_description:
I have had a headset since 2021, and was lured into it by ads for Supernatural. From then till now Flow was the only exercise I could do with any sort of regularity because it's so fun it doesn't feel like exercise. Fast forward to now and I've been stressing to find an alternative before my annual subscription runs out so I don't lose motivation for my recent goal of prioritizing my fitness. Luckily for me, my goal started April 1st and it just so happened to be the day FitXR released its own Flow. I tried it out, and it's great.. not perfect but definitely hits what I need. However I then tried out combat which I didn't think I would like because I never enjoyed boxing but I was very very wrong. Then I tried out Zumba and now I'm officially hooked. FitXR has it all, and I haven't even tried it all yet! If you're not much into exercise and really need the fun to motivate you, give FitXR a chance! I don't even remember the last time I had so much fun in the headset! The coaches are great, the scenery is wonderful, 'gameplay' is smooth and feels comfortable, and the cool down is an option to choose, so you're easily able to jump right into the next one! Additionally, the 3 month challenge is very cool and takes the thought process away from having to decide what to do because you can just do the challenges to start or just end there. Highly recommend.

CONS: If you're coming from SN Flow like me, FitXR Flow has a flaw. There are at times targets and tails that are out of my reach, and I can't calibrate it properly. Not the end of the world, but definitely bothersome if you're going for a streak. I would prefer to make the bats and targets black and white since I get confused which one is which but again, minor issue.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate you taking the time to share this, what a feast for the eyes a review like this is. It genuinely means a lot to see how much you’re enjoying the app and discovering classes you didn’t expect to love along the way. That kind of experience is exactly what we hope for. Thanks as well for sharing that feedback on Flow, especially around reach and visual clarity. The plan is always to keep smoothing and finessing the experience, so this is just the beginning, and hearing suggestions like yours is key to that. We’ll make sure it’s passed along to the team so they can take a closer look.

reviews.review_description:
every day a new training? that’s what i want ! i think the price is good,in the gym,you have to pay more! 

i love this way to stay fit & healthy in my house,which time i want to do! thanks for that and go on ♥️

update: für mich immer noch DAS beste fitnessgame im ganzen store !!

developer_response.body: This is amazing to read, thank you so much! We’re really happy you’re enjoying the variety of workouts and the freedom to train whenever you want from home. It means a lot to hear that it’s still your favorite fitness game in the store. Keep smashing those workouts! 💪

reviews.review_description: I loved the 1st 4 days.... but after that.. it got boring..... do top hits from the 70s, 80s, 90s.... do rock ballads.... songs that people can relate n connect with... wish I had a 30 day free trial 😌

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving FitXR a try and for taking the time to share your thoughts. Music taste is deeply personal and we know we can't please everyone, but feedback like yours is exactly what helps shape where we go next. We'll make sure it reaches the right people on our team.

reviews.review_description:
Original: Just got back into the quest after roughly a year. Was excited to get back into FitXR, an app I PAID for in the early days of the quest 2, only to find that now a subscription is required. So, now I can't use an app I paid for. I get the whole thing about adding new content and keeping it fresh, but something about this feels like the devs chose the greed door. Quite a few apps on quest get you moving, add new stuff all the time, and for big updates they offer a one-time paid dlc if you want that feature. I guess I'll go play with those. Was only going to leave 1 star just because of this cash grab, but they got 2 because I really did enjoy it back in the day.

Update 4-8-26: The FitXR team responded and reached out by email. My mistake, since I paid for the app before the subscription model, I do still have access to legacy content, and jumping in its still as good as I remember. I updated my rating score as this is still the best fitness app on quest IMO. The content I don't have access to looks great, but I despise subscription only pay models so I can't justify five stars at this time.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback, and we really appreciate you coming back to FitXR after some time away. It’s great to hear you enjoyed the app back in the early days 💛
We completely understand how the change to a subscription model can feel frustrating, especially if you originally purchased the app with a different expectation.
We’ve taken the liberty of reaching out to you directly via email so we can look into your account and clarify what access you should have as an early user. We’d love the chance to help and make sure you’re getting the experience you expect.

Thanks again for your honest feedback, and we hope to reconnect with you soon.

reviews.review_description:
I really love this application.  I have used Supernatural in the past.  Love the challenges, like the choices of workouts.  
The choice of coaching and music, levels and time preference. 
I do wish there were ways to communicate with Fit XR. 
Always telling me to see a month free to friends but not yet has it showed up in my email as promised.  Am I doing something wrong?

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, we’re really glad you’re enjoying FitXR. If you ever need to reach us, you can email support@fitxr.com. Our AI assistant takes care of most requests, but if you prefer to speak to a live agent, just mention it and the system will automatically connect you to one of us. As for the free month to share with friends, we recently added a feature where the code also appears directly on screen to make things easier. If you’re still not seeing it, feel free to reach out and we’ll gladly take a closer look.

reviews.review_description: Languages, Nowadays you could at least work on the text, Czech could also be on offer. There is also demand for the spoken word. Pls, work on that.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestion! We understand how important inclusivity is, so opening up the app to more languages is definitely on our radar. I'll make sure this gets shared with the team.

reviews.review_title: Great fun and a great workout
reviews.review_description: Lots of variety and difficulty levels to workout to.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Variety and a solid sweat session, that's what we're here for 💪 See you in the studio!

reviews.review_description: i burned so much calories and i was sweating doing coach Phoenix's advanced workout!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! 🔥 We're thrilled to hear Coach Phoenix's Advanced workout got your heart pumping and the sweat flowing. Keep up the amazing work!

reviews.review_description: I play this everyday just to get the battlepass rewards. Super fun and good way to get out some energy. Combat and flow are my favorites.

developer_response.body: That kind of consistency never goes unnoticed. It’s a solid way to keep the momentum going. Keep showing up, it adds up. Thanks for the love 💙

reviews.review_description: Flow workout is a great warm up for the heart and muscles before boxing or combat. It would be nice to have more and shorter workouts for shorter warm ups.

developer_response.body:
Really glad you’re enjoying Flow, it’s great to hear it’s working well as a warm-up!
Shorter sessions is a smart suggestion too. We’ll definitely share that with the team as we continue expanding the workout options.

reviews.review_description: This is a great workout. The music and training are both amazing that they keep you in the workout mindset. I would like it if it had a free version even if it was extremely limited with what they provide in it for times when i cant afford the subscription but it is definitely worth it if you can afford it.

developer_response.body: We appreciate you taking the time to write this. The team puts a lot of care into building these workouts, so hearing feedback like this really goes a long way. We’ll make sure your thoughts are shared with the team for future consideration. Thanks for being part of the journey with us 💪

reviews.review_title: The easy way to get fit
reviews.review_description: I'm very busy, so being able to stick the headset on when everyone else has gone to bed is extremely convenient. Like another reviewer, Im just not the sort of person who can be bothered to go to they gym. Even if I feel tired, it's so addictive that after a few minutes you are just punching away to the music and feel like you have a ton of energy. 45 minutes of really intense workout can fly by because it's just so satisfying and fun. Combat is my favourite but boxing and HIT are great too. The HIT classes have just started to click (I didn't really understand the point to begin with but it really gets your muscles burning). I just tried Sculpt as a warm down today and my thighs are now killing me. I can't overstate how important the music is. Doing a combat class (for example) timed to the music really makes it intense and a lot of fun. The trainers are mostly in-game avatars of the real people and they put a lot of enthusiasm and energy into their classes.  If I had some constructive feedback I would like to see some extra moves/actions added. Some other tips would be to get a cheap sillicone face interface (less sweaty than the standard foam one if using a Quest 3), and keep a fan blowing on you while working out to keep cool. I have a cheap bathroom fan that I just take off the wall and place in front of me when working out . This is a stellar keep-fit app and I'm glad I found it. You will ache, but you will have a LOT of fun (and improve your fitness no end) at the same time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a thoughtful review. We loved reading this. There’s something very satisfying about hearing how a quick session turns into 45 minutes before you even realize it. That’s exactly the kind of experience we hope people have when they jump in. We’ll definitely share your suggestion about adding more moves with the team, and you might be pleased to hear we’ve got some interesting things in the works, so stay tuned. In the meantime, keep those late night sessions going 💪

reviews.review_description: i burn 1400 cals in the course of four days . not only it works it also is fun me personly out of all the catagories i think combat is the best but there also is dance , box,and hiit . sorry for the bad spelling im typeing on my vr

developer_response.body: Leaving a review from inside the headset is the ultimate flex 😂 Love to hear you’re having fun with it and getting such great results along the way. Combat is definitely a favorite for a lot of people, but it’s awesome that you’re exploring the different classes too. Really appreciate you taking the time to share this with us, it means a lot 💙

reviews.review_title: Can you please introduce Bollywood dance
reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying FitXR, but would love it if you could introduce Bollywood dance and Zumba for latest Bollywood songs. I am sure it will be a great hit as many would love them!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch for this, really glad you’re enjoying FitXR! Bollywood-style dance classes would be such a fun addition, especially with newer tracks in the mix. Love this idea, I’ll make sure it gets shared with the team.

reviews.review_title: i got stuck after doing the trial
reviews.review_description: i'm stuck at the place or try after the trial and i do not recommend this game cuz i've been stuck here for a long time and i do not have know how to get past it

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about that. We checked your account in our system and didn't spot any bugs or issues blocking your progress. From the logs, you should be seeing a Continue button on the screen. Is that what you're looking at? If not, please reach out at support@fitxr.com and we'll guide you further.

reviews.review_title: Great fitness app, and great fun too.
reviews.review_description: I've been using this app for about 6 months now, gotta say its the best I've tried so far, not the cheapest, but a sight cheaper than a gym membership, keep up the good work guys

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! 🙌
We’re really glad you’re enjoying the workouts and having fun with it. It means a lot to hear it’s been your favorite over the past 6 months.
Thanks for your support, and we’ll keep working hard to make it even better 💪

reviews.review_description: Helps me be consistent

developer_response.body: Thank you for the fantastic review! 🌟 We're so happy to hear that FitXR is helping you stay consistent with your fitness routine. Keep up the great work, we're excited to be part of your journey! 💪

reviews.review_description:
I was using app daily, had fun and then my older kids wanted to try it, I didn’t want there experience to go toward my goals so they made their own profile, now I can’t get FitXR to open on my profile, and I paid the year subscription. 
Also no way to contact someone to help get the app fixed and back on my profile.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about this. We’ve checked your account on our side and can see all the profiles there, so we’re not quite sure what sort of issue you’re facing. We’ve just sent you an email to follow up, hope you don’t mind us reaching out directly as we couldn’t find anything from you in our inbox. When you get a chance, please reply there so we can look into it further and get everything sorted for you.

reviews.review_description: I have to agree with everyone that mentioned about FITXR being fun but effective. When I started I didn’t feel like I was working out. I was actually having fun. But when my workout was over, I felt the effects. My muscles felt used and worked. The next day I was sore. I was told when you’re sore you done something right. FITXR is the truth.

developer_response.body: That’s our favorite kind of surprise, when it feels like play and then your muscles remind you it absolutely was not 😄 Fun now, soreness later is a pretty solid formula. Really appreciate you sharing this and trusting the burn.

reviews.review_title: FLOW needs to Speed up!!! Even Expert
reviews.review_description: Even expert level is like you are playing in slow motion I know this is supposed to be a alternative to Supernatural and I’m trying my best not to compare like seriously it was like I was playing in molasses and I try to find positive and a lot of situations just speed it up I mean it could be OK. It honestly could be OK. I could see where it could be fun but two suggestions speed it up seriously speed it up and somehow find a way to get the targets on beat with the music otherwise I think it would be OK. It’s not a replacement for the real coaches. I’m always going have more fun in supernatural always will say that I enjoy supernatural better do I feel like I work out a little bit more in expert level FitXR I do so that part I’m a little conflicted however I enjoy supernatural more and always reach for it first.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear this didn’t land for you. Flow is a brand new addition to the app, one that was only just introduced, so we’re still looking at ways the experience can be improved and finessed as we continue to hear from the community. At the same time, FitXR offers a wide variety of other studios and training styles, so we hope you got a chance to explore those as well. We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts 👍

reviews.review_description: You use to be able to play the game for free, but now you sadly need to pay like dude. I would have put 5 stars but they then added a subscription so I’m now putting one unless they remove it and it becomes a one time payment.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your feedback. We understand subscriptions aren’t for everyone, and we appreciate you being honest about how you feel.
Our subscription helps us continue adding new workouts, music, features, and experiences regularly for players to enjoy. We’ll be sure to pass your feedback about one-time payment options on to the team.

reviews.review_description: Sweaty

developer_response.body: If you're sweating, we're winning 💪

reviews.review_description: Fit XR is a great workout. 1 complaint need better music you had Lady Gaga and that was the best music now it is not enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying the workouts! Music selection is important to us, so we'll definitely pass this feedback along 👍

reviews.review_description: Long time owner (back when it first started) but recently started again. I feel the subscription does bring some motivation by unlocking things. The monthly leader board is nifty too. I would like the ability to get some of the older environments (maybe redeam with movepoints?) as the arcade and ufo ones in booting messages look great! I felt the imagine seasons over oct nov dec were a little disapointing, but the microverse ones are pretty cool! Its nice to have fresh content too, which i feel the subscription justifies. Would be awesome in the future to see AI provide some coaching.

developer_response.body: Good to see you back. There’s something satisfying about giving something another go and finding new reasons to stick with it. Really appreciate the thoughtful feedback too, ideas like that are always interesting to chew on. Glad you’re back in the mix 💙

reviews.review_description:
I've been playing FitXR for a couple of years for 30 minutes every couple of days and I love the workout and motivation it gives me. With the new season updates to FitXR the developers went all out with new scenery, game elements, workouts, multiplayer and pumped up the graphics. I played some multiplayer and was highly motivated to be the best of the class, so I whas burning calories like crazy. And yes...sweat, sweat and sweat...
I would like to see some more music content from famous musicians. Especially when you have an monthly subscription like I have.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your continued support and for sharing such an awesome review! We love hearing how FitXR has kept you motivated,  you’re absolutely smashing those workouts! 💪
We also really appreciate your feedback about adding more music from well-known artists. That’s great input, and we’ll be sure to share it with the team. Thanks again for sweating it out with us!

reviews.review_description:
Update - Still a subscriber -- LOVE it still!  Love that there are daily challenges that earn virtual things and even physical things once a quarter if you earn them!!  You can't go wrong with this app -- Boxing, Combat, HIIT, Dance, Sculpt and Zumba!  And the developers are GREAT at listening to new ideas and implementing them!!!
 
My first review - LOVE IT!   Highly recommend.  Every time I finish I’m dripping with sweat.  So if you are looking for a workout - this is it!

And for the “bad review” points. 

Yes, the music is different.  But I personally like it.  If I want to hear the Top 100-that’s what driving in my car is for!   I see it as a way of broadening my musical taste!  

As for the subscription. I got FitXR when it was “free” and you could buy DLC. Initially I was rowing the boat with everyone else and said “I won’t be a subscriber when my trial period is over”. And guess what!  I’m a subscriber now!  The way I look at it.  If I do just one class a day (which I typically do more)-it’s only 33 cents for that one class!   Quite the deal!!

Are there still some kinks?  Yeah-but they are working them out and always keep everyone in the loop on their Fb page.  

Keep up the great work!!!

developer_response.body: Honestly, this is exactly why we build FitXR. It starts with “I’ll try it” and somehow turns into real sweat, real routines, and sticking around longer than expected. We’re still tweaking, still listening, and still pushing to make it better, so hearing this kind of long term love really does mean a lot. Appreciate you being part of it and we’ll see you in the next workout 💪

reviews.review_description:
I’ve tried a few VR fitness apps, including Supernatural, and honestly… FitXR is the one that finally stuck for me.

The variety is what really sets it apart. Instead of feeling repetitive, every workout feels different and engaging. I can jump between boxing, combat, HIIT, dance, and other classes depending on my mood, which keeps me consistent and motivated.

The boxing and combat workouts are my favorite so far. They’re intense, fast-paced, and actually make me forget I’m exercising. It feels more like training or gaming than working out, and before I know it I’m drenched in sweat and my heart rate is up. That’s exactly what I want from VR fitness.

developer_response.body: This review is screenshot worthy 👊 If a workout feels like a game and you only realize it was “exercise” when you’re drenched, we’ve done our job right. Appreciate you being here, now go make that headset earn its keep. Thanks for the love 💙

reviews.review_title: Would rather go to an actual gym
reviews.review_description: If i wanted to buy a membership/subscription, I'd just go to an actual gym

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your feedback. We understand that subscriptions aren't for everyone, and for some people a traditional gym is the better fit. Our goal with FitXR is to provide a convenient and engaging way to work out from home, with a wide variety of classes and trainers that can fit around different schedules and lifestyles. We appreciate you giving FitXR a try and wish you the best on your fitness journey.

reviews.review_description: I decided to embark on a healthy weight loss journey and decided to give this game a go after reading so many positive reviews on it, I have to say - they were not wrong. This gives me clear direction for my goals and I feel the burn and sweat coming off me its that good! I highly recommed this for anyone who wants some fun or want to take their fitness seriously with care!

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you decided to take that step and bring us along for the journey. Choosing to show up for yourself is a big deal, and it’s amazing to hear you’re enjoying the process. Wishing you all the best as you keep moving toward your goals 💙

reviews.review_description:
Never thought I’d ever enjoy exercise in my life, or even bother to write a review for anything related to body punishment, but FitXR has changed my mindset towards working out forever. Ive never stuck to any workout routine before and I’m almost 50 but here I can’t bear to lose my streak! I love and look forward every day plus Sunday to being able to compete against others with each workout, the music, the variety, the environment, the varied intensity, the coaching encouragement, EVERYTHING. First time I’ve ever looked forward to working out. 

Keep bringing more engaging and immersive VR innovation so things don’t get stale’

developer_response.body: Calling it “body punishment” and then saying you now look forward to it is honestly the best compliment we could get. Streaks have a funny way of sneaking consistency into your life, and we love that FitXR became the thing you don’t want to skip. Knowing it’s part of your day, not something you have to force yourself into, is exactly why we keep building this. We hear you loud and clear on keeping things fresh, and we’re not done yet. Really glad to have you in our community 💙
